# uptimepage_target (Data Source)

Look up a single target by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uptimepage_target" "existing" {
  id = "01h7m8z4n6v0e1m7v7y6x8x8x8"
}

output "target_name" {
  value = data.uptimepage_target.existing.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Target id (UUID).

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `group_name` (String)
- `interval` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `owner_user_id` (String)
- `regions` (Set of String) Regions this target probes from.
- `tags` (Set of String)
